content.full_text:
Assembly California Legislature

PHILLIP D. WYMAN
ASSEMBLYMAN, THIRTY-FOURTH DISTRICT

July 11, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, Ca 95814

Attention: Blanca Breeze

Dear Ms. Breeze:

This letter is to request confirmation of a telephone conversation between our offices on July 10, 1990, to the effect that (1) a candidate who receives a scholarship for attendance at a convention would have to report receipt of those funds as either a gift or income and (2) a candidate may then deposit those funds in his campaign account.

Thank you for your attention to this request.

Sincerely,

[signature]

PHILLIP D. WYMAN

PDW:slt
